cards.name: Dunathi Champion
cards.active: “Challenge me!” At the start of Pairing, this Unit may issue a Challenge to one enemy Hero Unit on the same battlefield. If that enemy Unit declines, decrease its Attack and Special characteristics by 1. If it accepts, immediately Pair these Units. Neither Units may Retreat or be forced to Retreat from the battlefield until the end of the battle. Both Units are Invincible to all damage that is dealt to them other than the enemy Unit participating in the Challenge. If this Unit dies in a Challenge, you lose 1 Tactical Health. If this Unit destroys an enemy Hero Unit in a Challenge, deal 1 Tactical Damage to its controlling player.
cards.passive: “Martial Prowess” While this Unit is Paired with an enemy Hero Unit, increase this Unit’s Defense characteristic by 1. If that Hero is a Unique Unit, instead increase its Defense by 2.
